case_title: CCSF/ TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. SCOTT BOLAND

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-19-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF REPRESENTED BY ROSA RAMIREZ, SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
